description_long: This pastry shop features a two-story structure with a facade of light-colored brickwork and a steeply pitched, tiled roof. The front is adorned with a large, mustard-yellow awning above a wooden storefront, which includes wide windows and a central entrance. Above the awning, a decorative sign reads 'St. Hubertus' in elegant script, set against a deep red background. The upper floor has two shuttered windows with stone sills, while the side of the building is partially covered in green ivy, adding a touch of natural charm. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with additional windows and a continuation of the brickwork. The overall appearance suggests a traditional European or French-style pastry shop, inviting and well-integrated into an urban streetscape.
description: A charming, two-story brick pastry shop with a tiled roof, mustard-yellow awning, and a prominent 'St. Hubertus' sign above a wooden storefront.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, large mustard-yellow awning, wooden storefront, and the 'St. Hubertus' sign above two shuttered windows.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the plain brick wall, a sloped roof, and a lush patch of ivy climbing up the facade.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a simpler brick wall with a large window and the continuation of the tiled roof, with the ivy visible on the left.
description_view_3: The right side view features a single shuttered window above the wooden lower facade and the edge of the yellow awning.
attribute_storefront_signage: A prominent rectangular sign is mounted above the awning, featuring the text 'St. Hubertus' in ornate, gold script on a deep red background. The sign is bordered by a thin gold line and is centered between the two upper windows. The style is classic and elegant, matching the traditional aesthetic of the shop.
attribute_architectural_style: Traditional European, with elements reminiscent of French or Belgian urban architecture, including light brickwork, a steeply pitched tiled roof, shuttered windows, and a decorative awning.
